subcodes.first_line: ...As to thy coming to Egypt, it will bring happiness both to thy heart and to ours.  I suggested this to thee two months ago, that we proceed to Egypt together
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سراج محبت الله نامه مورخ ۱۳ جنوری ۱۹۱۲ وصول یافت الحمد لله دلیل بر صحت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @personal instructions, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
